fajita-spice-blend.name: Fajita Spice Blend
instructions: Combine chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, paprika, onion powder, oregano, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Pour into a small glass container and secure with an airtight lid. Store up to 1 year.
Enjoy!

fall-squash-waffles.name: Fall Squash Waffles
instructions: Place acorn squash, cut-side down, in a microwave-safe dish; add enough water to reach a 1-inch depth. Microwave until tender, about 20 minutes. Set aside until cool enough to handle. Scoop out squash flesh; discard peel.

Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, cloves, and ginger in a bowl; set aside. Combine squash flesh, milk, brown sugar, eggs, and vegetable oil in the bowl a food processor; pulse until smooth. Add flour mixture; pulse until batter is smooth.
Preheat a waffle iron according to manufacturer's instructions. Coat waffle iron with cooking spray.

Pour 1/4 to 3/4 cup batter (according to manufacturer's instructions) into center of the iron. Cook in the preheated waffle iron until waffle is golden brown and the iron stops steaming. Repeat with remaining batter.

fat-dumplings-lezzet.name: Fat Dumplings
instructions: 1. melt yeast in water.
2. Mix eggs, olive oil, yogurt and salt in a large bowl.
3. Add yeast juice.
4. Adding and kneading flour.
5.  Gerekirse un ilave edin.

8. Open the dough on the countertop and cut 6-7 cm squares.
9. Place the meats from the mortar.
10. Combine and close the ends.
11. 11. Celebrate the shatters in the angry oil in order to stay at the bottom.

festive-eggnog-fudge.name: Festive Eggnog Fudge
instructions: Line a 9-inch square baking pan with aluminum foil, leaving an overhang on both sides. Grease aluminum foil.

Combine sugar, eggnog, and butter in a large saucepan over medium heat; bring to a boil, stirring constantly, about 5 minutes. Off heat, add vanilla candy and marshmallow creme; stir until smooth. Stir in rum extract. Pour fudge mixture into the prepared baking pan. Lightly sprinkle nutmeg on top.
Cool fudge to room temperature, about 30 minutes. Score fudge into 36 pieces. Refrigerate until firm, about 1 hour.
Lift up aluminum foil ends to remove fudge from the pan. Cut through scored lines with a large knife.

fettuccini-recipe-with-scallops-in-frenc.name: Fettuccini Recipe With Scallops In French Sauce
fettuccini-recipe-with-scallops-in-frenc.original_name: Receta de fetuccinni con vieiras en salsa francesa

fish-from-the-garden-with-tartar-sauce-t.name: Fish From The Garden With Tartar Sauce
fish-from-the-garden-with-tartar-sauce-t.original_name: Peixinhos da horta com molho tártaro
instructions: In a bowl put the flour and water with gas previously seasoned with salt and pepper. Involve very well until you get a homogeneous pole.

Fix the green beans by removing the ends and wires, wash and drain. Light a frying pan with abundant oil and let it warm well. Pass one green bean at a time through the previous pepper and fry them in the hot oil. Remove and let it run on absorbent paper.

Now prepare the tartar sauce: peel the egg and pinch it finely, as well as pickles and a little parsley. Mix the mayonnaise with the egg, pickles and a little parsley, mix everything well and season with salt and pepper. Serve the little fish in the garden with this sauce.

fish-meatballs-in-sauce-and-healthy-pequ.name: Fish Meatballs In Sauce (And Healthy)
fish-meatballs-in-sauce-and-healthy-pequ.original_name: Albóndigas de pescado en salsa (fáciles y saludables)

ingredients.item: 450 g of white fish (hake, pink, fish...)

fish-pickle-teleculinaria.name: Fish Pickle
instructions: Season the fish posts with 2 chopped garlic, lemon juice, some milk, salt and pepper and let marinate for a few minutes. Then pour them out and core them into hot olive oil. Remove and reserve.

Peel the onions and cut them into half-moons. In a frying pan, saute the onions in the fish sauce as well as the other chopped garlic. Add the pepper, seedless and cut into strips, and the chopped parsley. Put the fish back in the frying pan, cover and let it stew until the fish becomes soft.
Cool with vinegar and white wine and boil until alcohol evaporates. Put the fish on a platter, water it with the scale and serve hot.

instructions: 1. Take a wide rough of half weight cleaned Jumbo shrimp.
2. Add up to 1 cup and wait for 30 minutes.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in butter pan.

fish-rice-on-the-board-teleculinaria.name: Fish Rice On The Board
instructions: Peel the onions and garlic and pinch them. Light a pot with the blonde, onion, garlic and olive oil and let it shine, stirring from time to time. Add the tomato and then the rice. Water with the wine, without stopping stirring, and remove from the fire, after a few minutes.

Add the clam broth, 600 ml of boiling water, salt and pyri and stir. Lay the prepared on a platter (pyrex type), cover with aluminium foil and put it in the nine, preheated at 180 Remove from the oven, destap and stir the rice with a fork.

Place the fish posts on the rice, put the foil back in the nine for another 10 to 15 minutes. Make sure the rice is cooked, remove it from the nine and dispose of the paper. Sprinkle with chopped coriander and serves immediately.

fish-tacos-with-kumquat-salsa.name: Fish Tacos With Kumquat Salsa
instructions: Make the kumquat salsa: In a small bowl, stir together the kumquats, red onion, Fresno chile, cilantro, lime juice, and salt.
Make the fish tacos: Season the halibut with the salt, ancho chile powder, garlic powder, and cumin.

Heat the grapeseed oil in a medium cast iron skillet over high heat. Add the halibut and cook, flipping once with a fish spatula, until seared and cooked through on both sides, about 3 minutes per side, depending on the thickness of the fish. Remove the fish from the skillet and flake into large pieces with a fork.
In a medium bowl, toss the red cabbage with the lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Assemble the tacos: Add some of the red cabbage to the tortillas, then top with some of the fish, a spoonful of kumquat salsa, a few slices of avocado and radish, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Enjoy!
RECIPE BY: Talia Goldstein

flakiest-pie-crust.name: Flakiest Pie Crust

ingredients.item: (2 sticks) plus 2 tablespoons chilled unsalted butter

instructions: Mix flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl. Toss butter in flour mixture to evenly coat. Working quickly and aggressively, use your fingers to rub butter into flour to create large, shaggy pieces of dough (the idea is to smash the butter into the flour, creating some pieces that are flat and thin and some that are large and chunky).

Combine vinegar and 3 Tbsp. ice water in a small bowl and drizzle over flour mixture, running your fingers through the flour as you drizzle to evenly distribute (think of running your fingers through your hair). Knead dough in the bowl until it starts to come together (it will still look a little dry).

Turn dough out onto a work surface and knead 1 or 2 more times, pressing to incorporate shaggy edges. Divide dough into 2 pieces and press into about 1"-thick disks. Wrap with plastic and chill at least 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 5 days ahead; keep chilled, or freeze up to 1 month.

flank-steak-with-artichoke-potato-hash-a.name: Flank Steak With Artichoke-potato Hash And Aleppo-pepper Aioli

ingredients.prep: such as baby Dutch or Russian Banana

instructions: Mash garlic, Aleppo pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon coarse salt to paste in mortar with pestle or in small bowl with back of spoon. Whisk in remaining ingredients. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Mix thyme, Aleppo pepper, 1 teaspoon coarse salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in small bowl. Rub seasoning mixture into steak; set aside. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover; chill. Bring to room temperature before continuing.

Squeeze juice from lemon half into medium bowl of water. Cut 1/2 inch from tops of artichokes. Working with 1 artichoke at a time, break off dark outer leaves until only pale yellow leaves remain. Cut artichokes lengthwise in half; cut each half into 1/2-inch wedges. Place in lemon water to prevent browning.

Place potatoes in heavy large saucepan. Add enough cold water to cover; sprinkle with salt. Bring to boil; reduce heat to medium-high and boil until potatoes are just tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain. Transfer to baking sheet until cool enough to handle. Halve or quarter potatoes.

Drain artichokes; pat to dry well, then sprinkle with salt and pepper. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add artichokes and sauté until browned, about 4 minutes. Add 1/2 cup water, thyme sprigs, and garlic. Cover skillet and simmer over medium heat until artichokes are tender, about 5 minutes. Uncover and boil until no liquid remains, stirring often, 2 to 3 minutes. Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil and potatoes; stir to coat. Add cream and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cook until potatoes are heated through and browned in spots, stirring often, about 6 minutes. Season hash to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Heat peanut oil in heavy large ovenproof skillet over high heat. Add steak and cook until bottom is brown, about 2 minutes. Turn steak over; transfer to oven and roast until cooked to desired doneness, about 7 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer to work surface; tent with foil to keep warm. Let rest 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, rewarm artichoke-potato hash gently over medium heat. Stir in chopped chives. Thinly slice steak crosswise. Divide steak and hash among plates. Drizzle some aioli over steak. Serve, passing remaining aioli alongside.

flavored-latte.name: Flavored Latte
instructions: Pour milk into a steaming pitcher and heat to 145 to 74°C (65 to 70 degrees C) using the steaming wand. Pour flavored syrup into a large coffee mug. Add espresso, then pour in steamed milk, using a spoon to hold back the foam. Spoon foam over the top.

flax-and-sunflower-seed-bread.name: Flax And Sunflower Seed Bread
instructions: Place all ingredients (except sunflower seeds) in the pan of the bread machine in the order recommended by the manufacturer. Select Basic White Cycle; press Start. Add the sunflower seeds when the alert sounds during the Knead Cycle.

folar-sweet-sausage-from-the-azores-tele.name: Folar Sweet Sausage From The Azores
folar-sweet-sausage-from-the-azores-tele.original_name: Folar doce de linguiça dos Açores

ingredients.item: 11 g de fermento de padeiro seco

instructions: PREPARATION

Dissolve yeast in warm milk. Lay the flour on the counter, open a cavity in the center, pour the sugar, salt, butter, eggs and milk with yeast. Mix everything well and work the dough until it gets off the bench and hands. Form a ball, place it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cover with a cloth and let it leave in a warm place until it triples in volume.

In the meantime, remove the skin from the sausages and cut them into pieces. After leavened, put the dough back on the bench, cast in ball shape and flatten it. Put it on a tray, sprinkled with flour, and brush it with beaten egg.
Lay out the pieces of sausage over the leaf, pressing a little. Tape with a cloth and let it leave for another 30 minutes.
Then brush again all the folar with beaten egg and take it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 40 minutes. Remove, let it cool and serve.

french-fried-onions.name: French Fried Onions
instructions: Soak onions in milk for 5 minutes.
Combine flour, garlic powder, onion powder, white pepper, and salt. Add a handful of onions and toss to coat. Remove and repeat with remaining onions, one handful at a time.

Heat oil in a large skillet or deep fryer. Fry onion in batches, stirring as needed, until evenly browned, 2 to 3 minutes each. Drain on paper towels and season with more salt. Store in an airtight container.

french-pepper-steak-steak-au-poivre.name: French Pepper Steak (steak Au Poivre)
instructions: Wrap the peppercorns in a lint-free kitchen towel, then smash with the bottom of a skillet until coarsely crushed.
Liberally season the steak on all sides with the salt and crushed peppercorns, using your hands to press the seasoning into the meat to create an even coating.

Heat the vegetable oil and 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until just smoking. Add the steak to the pan and sear for 4 minutes. Flip and sear the other side for another 4 minutes, for medium-rare. If steak has a fat-cap on its side, be sure to sear it as well for 30–60 seconds. Once cooked to desired doneness, transfer the steak to a cutting board to rest.

Reduce the heat to medium and add the brandy to the skillet. Allow the brandy to cook down for about 1 minute while using a whisk to scrape up any browned bits in the bottom of the pan. Once the brandy has reduced by half, add the cream, mustard, and remaining tablespoon of butter and continue to cook until the mixture begins to reduce and thicken, 5-7 minutes. The sauce should have a rich consistency and coat the back of a spoon.
Slice the steak into ½-inch (1½-cm) pieces. Pour the sauce over the top and serve.
Enjoy!

french-toast-strata.name: French Toast Strata
instructions:
Preheat oven to 163°C. Coat a 13 X 9-inch casserole dish with cooking spray and set aside. Cut baguette into 1/2-inch cubes and spread along the bottom of the dish. In a large bowl, combine eggs, buttermilk, maple syrup, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well and pour over bread. Cover with plastic wrap and press down lightly, so the bread absorbs the egg mixture. Refrigerate at least 2 hours (or overnight) before baking.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until eggs are set.
When removed from oven, sprinkle with brown sugar and let stand for 10-15 minutes before serving.

fresh-salmon-in-a-package-with-aromatic-.name: Fresh Salmon In A Package With Aromatic Butter
fresh-salmon-in-a-package-with-aromatic-.original_name: Φρέσκος σολωμός σε πακέτο με αρωματικό βούτυρο

ingredients.item: 4 salmon fillets or 4 slides fresh salmon
4 salmon fillets or 4 slides fresh salmon

instructions: In a bowl, add the butter, zest and lemon juice, dill, salt and some pepper. Mix well with the knife blade until the mixture is homogenized.
Transfer the mixture into a piece of transparent membrane, wrap it in a roll and fighten the edges to form a button cylinder. Place it in the freezer for 15 minutes, until it thinks and cuts easily.
Spread 4 pieces of non-stick paper (in size about A4) and place in the center of a salmon fillet. Salt and pepper.
Cut the aromatic button into slices and place one slide on each fish, along with half a slide of lemon and one clone of dill.
Round the parchment paper with egg white and fold in a pack, closing very well so that the liquids do not leave during baking.
Place the packages in sheet metal and bake at 200°C for 20 minutes.

fresh-summertime-bow-tie-ham-salad.name: Fresh Summertime Bow Tie Ham Salad
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook bow tie pasta at a boil, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Drain.
Toss ham, tomatoes, bell peppers, green onions, garlic, black pepper, and salt together in a bowl.
Stir pasta and mayonnaise into ham mixture; sprinkle with cheese and cilantro then stir until well combined. Chill before serving, at least 1 hour.

fresh-tuna-ceviche-teleculinaria.name: Fresh Tuna Ceviche
instructions: Wash the lettuce and let it run. Wash the tomatoes and cut them in half. Mix them with the lettuce, put them in a salad bowl and add some croutons.
Cut the tuna into strips, longitudinally, and then into cubes, gently supporting your fingers on the fish.
In a bowl, mix the pieces of tuna with soy sauce, olive oil, coarse salt or salt flower, orange juice, lemon and limes, 1 lime and pepper scrape. Serves immediately with the salad.

fried-potato-wedges.name: Fried Potato Wedges
instructions: Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Slice potatoes into 16 wedges.
Combine flour, chili powder, chicken bouillon, paprika, black pepper, and cayenne in a 1-gallon resealable plastic bag.
Dip potato wedges in milk, then shake them in the flour mixture. Fry in the hot oil until golden brown, 5 to 6 minutes per batch. Let drain on paper towels.

fringe-stitching-teleculinaria.name: Fringe Stitching

ingredients.item: Raspa de casca de tangerina q.b.

instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water. Place on the counter the flour mixed with the lemon and tangerine scrapes and open a cavity in the center. Add the brandy, water with the yeast, yolks and eggs and knead well until homogeneous.
Mold the dough into a ball, put it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cover it with a damp cloth and let it leave till double the volume.

Then stretch the dough on the powdered bench with flour and cut small rectangles. Make some cuts on each, as you see in the photo, and take to fry in very hot oil. Remove, pour on absorbent paper, pass through sugar and cinnamon and serve.

frosted-nuts.name: Frosted Nuts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300˚F (150˚C).
In a large bowl, combine the walnuts, egg whites, sugar, and salt and mix with a rubber spatula until the walnuts are well-coated.
Spread the walnut mixture evenly on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until the walnuts are crystallized.
Cool completely.
Enjoy!

fusilli-with-stuffed-fillets-argiro.name: Fusilli With Stuffed Fillets

ingredients.item: 4 fat pig or beef cut very thin
4 fat pig or beef cut very thin

instructions: Open the fillets with a heavy object until they become as think as possible.
Cut the mozzarella into very thin slices. Place the slides on each fillet, sprinkle with a little basil and wrap on a roll. Fix with toothpicks so they don't open.
Heat a pan with olive oil and perfume with gallic for 1–2 minutes.
Remove the garage, add the tomato and bottle for 5 minutes.
Place the fillets in the pan, salt and pepper, cover with lid and simmer for 15–17 minutes until the meat softens.
Remove from heat, transfer the fillets to a platter, remove the toothpicks and keep them warm.
Boil the fusili in salted water, holding a cup of their water.
In the same pan, add the pesto sauce and dilute with some of the pasta water.
Add the fusilli to the pan and mix well, adding as much water as necessary to make the sauce we want. Salt and pepper and sprinkle with chopped basil.
Serve the fusilli in deep dishes immediately, placing an involtini on each fish.
Sprinkle with some parmesan and sprinkle with some raw olive oil.
